header.title: 子主機管理
header.subtitle: 在您的SysManage基礎設施中創建、管理和監控子主機的完整指南，包括WSL實例、容器和虛擬機。

overview.title: 概述
overview.description: SysManage中的子主機管理使您能夠直接從Web介面創建和管理虛擬化環境。這包括Windows子系統Linux（WSL）實例、LXD/LXC容器和各種虛擬機技術。子主機會自動註冊為託管主機，並預安裝sysmanage-agent。
overview.concept_parent: 父主機：託管子環境的實體或虛擬機
overview.concept_child: 子主機：在父主機上運行的虛擬化環境（WSL、容器或虛擬機）
overview.concept_distribution: 發行版：用於創建子主機的作業系統映像（例如Ubuntu、Debian、Fedora）
overview.concept_agent: 代理自動安裝：子主機在創建期間自動接收sysmanage-agent
overview.type_wsl: WSL（Windows子系統Linux）：在Windows主機上運行Linux發行版

detection.title: 虛擬化檢測
detection.process_desc: SysManage會自動檢測每個託管主機上的虛擬化功能。代理查詢系統以確定哪些虛擬化技術可用，並將此資訊報告給伺服器。
detection.cap_installed: 已安裝的虛擬機監控程式：已安裝哪些虛擬化軟體
detection.cap_enabled: 已啟用的功能：哪些功能已啟用並準備使用
detection.cap_reboot: 待處理配置：需要重新啟動才能啟用的功能
detection.wsl_desc: 在Windows主機上，SysManage檢測WSL狀態，如果尚未配置WSL，可以自動啟用WSL：
detection.wsl_not_installed: 未安裝：WSL功能未啟用 - 可透過SysManage啟用
detection.wsl_needs_reboot: 需要重新啟動：WSL已啟用但需要系統重新啟動
detection.wsl_ready: 就緒：WSL已啟用並準備創建子主機

tab.info_list: 子主機清單：所有子主機及其狀態（運行中、已停止、創建中、錯誤）

tab.info_enable: 啟用按鈕：如果尚未啟用WSL或其他虛擬化，則啟用它

create.title: 創建子主機
create.prereq_virtualization: 必須在父主機上啟用虛擬化
create.prereq_permission: 使用者必須具有「創建子主機」權限
create.prereq_distribution: 必須在設定 > 發行版中啟用所需的發行版
create.prereq_network: 下載發行版映像的網路連接
create.step1: 點擊子主機標籤上的「創建子主機」按鈕
create.step2: 選擇虛擬化類型（如果有多個可用）
create.step3: 從下拉清單中選擇發行版
create.step4: 輸入新子主機的主機名稱
create.step5: 提供初始使用者帳戶的使用者名稱和密碼
create.step6: 點擊「創建」開始安裝過程
create.field_type: 虛擬化類型：WSL、LXD、VirtualBox等（基於主機功能）
create.field_distribution: 發行版：要安裝的作業系統（例如Ubuntu 24.04 LTS）
create.field_hostname: 主機名稱：子主機的唯一識別碼（建議格式：parent-wsl-distro）
create.field_username: 使用者名稱：要創建的非root使用者帳戶
create.field_password: 密碼：新使用者帳戶的密碼（SysManage不儲存）
create.progress_desc: 在創建期間，SysManage顯示即時進度，包括：
create.progress_download: 發行版下載（如果未快取）
create.approval_desc: 創建完成後，新子主機的代理將連接到伺服器。管理員必須在主機清單中批准新主機，就像任何其他新代理註冊一樣。一旦批准，子主機就會完全託管。

proplus_notice.title: 需要 Professional+
proplus_notice.description: 建立子主機需要包含 container_engine 模組的 Professional+ 授權。社群版使用者可以檢視現有子主機，但無法建立新的子主機。

manage.title: 管理子主機
manage.start_desc: 啟動已停止的子主機。子主機將啟動並開始向SysManage報告。
manage.stop_desc: 正常關閉正在運行的子主機。子主機內的所有進程都將終止。
manage.restart_desc: 停止然後啟動子主機。用於應用配置更改。
manage.delete_desc: 永久刪除子主機及其所有資料。此操作無法撤銷。
manage.delete_warning_desc: 刪除子主機會永久刪除其中儲存的所有資料。對於WSL，這會運行'wsl --unregister'，完全刪除發行版。在刪除之前，請確保您已備份任何重要資料。
manage.status_running: 運行中：子主機活躍並有回應
manage.status_pending: 待批准：代理正在等待管理員批准
manage.status_error: 錯誤：發生錯誤 - 查看詳細資訊以了解更多資訊

proplus_notice.title: 生命週期操作需要 Professional+
proplus_notice.description: 啟動、停止、重新啟動和刪除子主機需要包含 container_engine 模組的 Professional+ 授權。檢視子主機狀態在社群版中仍然可用。

hosts_list.filter_all: 所有主機：顯示父主機和子主機

wsl.title: WSL特定資訊
wsl.req_systemd: systemd支援（在創建期間自動啟用）
wsl.enable_desc: 如果Windows主機上未啟用WSL，SysManage可以自動啟用它：
wsl.enable_step1: 點擊子主機標籤上的「啟用WSL」
wsl.enable_step2: 代理將運行必要的Windows命令
wsl.enable_step3: 可能需要重新啟動 - 主機將顯示「需要重新啟動」
wsl.enable_step4: 重新啟動後，WSL將準備使用
wsl.distributions_desc: SysManage預配置了支援sysmanage-agent套件可用的發行版：

lxd.title: LXD容器管理
lxd.overview_desc: LXD是適用於Linux的現代容器和虛擬機器管理器。SysManage與LXD整合，可直接從Web介面無縫創建和管理Linux容器。
lxd.req_installed: LXD必須安裝在主機上（snap或原生套件）
lxd.req_initialized: LXD必須已初始化（lxd init完成）
lxd.req_bridge: 必須配置網路橋接（預設：lxdbr0）
lxd.detection_desc: SysManage通過檢查以下內容自動偵測LXD功能：
lxd.detect_3: 創建和管理容器的權限
lxd.detection_role: 偵測到時，主機將被分配LXD主機角色，LXD將顯示為可用的虛擬化類型。
lxd.setup_desc: 準備主機進行LXD容器管理：
lxd.setup_step1: 安裝LXD：sudo snap install lxd或通過套件管理器
lxd.setup_step2: 初始化LXD：sudo lxd init（接受預設值或自訂）
lxd.setup_step3: 將代理使用者加入lxd群組：sudo usermod -aG lxd sysmanage-agent
lxd.setup_step4: 重新啟動sysmanage-agent服務以套用群組成員資格
lxd.creation_step1: SysManage從官方雲端映像啟動容器
lxd.creation_step3: 使用sudo權限創建指定的使用者帳戶
lxd.creation_step4: 根據發行版配置套件儲存庫
lxd.creation_step6: 生成包含伺服器連接詳細資訊的代理配置
lxd.creation_step7: 代理服務啟動並連接到SysManage
lxd.creation_step8: 容器出現在待批准的主機清單中
lxd.networking_desc: LXD容器使用預設的橋接網路：
lxd.net_dns: DNS：容器可以通過主機的DNS配置解析外部主機名稱
lxd.networking_note: 容器要與SysManage伺服器通訊，主機必須能夠存取伺服器網路，容器必須能夠通過主機路由。
lxd.distributions_desc: 可以使用任何提供sysmanage-agent的發行版創建LXD容器：
lxd.comparison_desc: LXD和WSL都提供容器化的Linux環境，但在幾個方面有所不同：
lxd.comparison_platform: 平台：LXD在Linux主機上運行；WSL在Windows主機上運行
lxd.comparison_networking: 網路：LXD容器在lxdbr0上取得可路由的IP；WSL實例共享Windows主機網路
lxd.comparison_images: 映像：LXD從官方映像伺服器拉取；WSL使用Microsoft Store發行版
lxd.comparison_features: 功能：LXD支援快照、設定檔和叢集；WSL專注於開發工具整合

troubleshooting.title: 故障排除
troubleshooting.issue1_sol1: 驗證父主機具有網路連接
troubleshooting.issue1_sol2: 檢查發行版是否在設定中啟用
troubleshooting.issue1_sol3: 確保父主機上有足夠的磁碟空間
troubleshooting.issue1_sol4: 查看子主機狀態中的錯誤訊息
troubleshooting.issue2_desc: 這是正常行為。使用SysManage的重新啟動功能重新啟動Windows主機，然後重試創建子主機。
troubleshooting.issue3_sol1: 驗證子主機正在運行（未停止）
troubleshooting.issue3_sol2: 檢查sysmanage-agent服務是否在子主機內運行
troubleshooting.issue3_sol3: 驗證從子主機到SysManage伺服器的網路連接
troubleshooting.issue3_sol4: 查看代理日誌以了解連接錯誤
troubleshooting.issue4_desc: 點擊子主機以查看錯誤詳細資訊。常見原因包括：
troubleshooting.issue5_desc: 如果LXD容器創建失敗，請檢查以下內容：
troubleshooting.issue5_sol1: 驗證LXD已初始化：lxc list應該無錯誤運行
troubleshooting.issue5_sol2: 檢查lxdbr0網路是否存在：lxc network list
troubleshooting.issue5_sol3: 確保sysmanage-agent使用者在lxd群組中：groups sysmanage-agent
troubleshooting.issue6_desc: 如果容器啟動但沒有網路連接：
troubleshooting.issue6_sol1: 驗證lxdbr0正在運行：lxc network show lxdbr0
troubleshooting.issue6_sol2: 檢查容器網路配置：lxc config show CONTAINER
troubleshooting.issue6_sol3: 驗證DHCP正在工作：lxc exec CONTAINER -- ip addr
troubleshooting.issue6_sol4: 嘗試重新啟動網路：lxc restart CONTAINER
troubleshooting.issue7_desc: 如果已安裝LXD的主機未顯示LXD主機角色：
troubleshooting.issue7_sol1: 驗證LXD套接字存在且可存取
troubleshooting.issue7_sol2: 檢查sysmanage-agent使用者是否具有lxd群組成員資格
troubleshooting.issue7_sol4: 等待下一個角色偵測週期或重新啟動代理
troubleshooting.issue8_desc: 這是預期行為。出於安全原因，LXD容器預設以非特權方式運行。代理將相應地報告其功能。容器仍然可以完全管理，但某些特權操作（如安裝某些套件）可能需要配置更改。
troubleshooting.issue9_sol1: Überprüfen Sie, ob KVM aktiviert ist: virsh list --all sollte ohne Fehler funktionieren
troubleshooting.issue9_sol2: Prüfen Sie, ob libvirt läuft: sudo systemctl status libvirtd
troubleshooting.issue9_sol3: Stellen Sie sicher, dass der sysmanage-agent-Benutzer in der libvirt-Gruppe ist: groups sysmanage-agent
troubleshooting.issue9_sol5: Prüfen Sie, ob die Cloud-Image-URL vom Host aus erreichbar ist
troubleshooting.issue10_sol1: Überprüfen Sie, ob das Standardnetzwerk aktiv ist: virsh net-list
troubleshooting.issue10_sol2: Starten Sie das Netzwerk bei Bedarf: virsh net-start default
troubleshooting.issue10_sol4: Überprüfen Sie, ob die virbr0-Brücke existiert: ip addr show virbr0
troubleshooting.issue11_sol1: Überprüfen Sie, ob /dev/kvm existiert und zugänglich ist
troubleshooting.issue11_sol2: Prüfen Sie, ob libvirtd läuft und der virsh-Befehl funktioniert
troubleshooting.issue11_sol3: Stellen Sie sicher, dass der sysmanage-agent-Benutzer libvirt-Gruppenmitglied ist
troubleshooting.issue11_sol4: Starten Sie sysmanage-agent nach dem Hinzufügen zur libvirt-Gruppe neu
troubleshooting.issue12_sol3: Überprüfen Sie, ob die DNS-Auflösung in der VM funktioniert
troubleshooting.issue12_sol4: Prüfen Sie, ob die Paketinstallation aufgrund von Repository-Zugriffsproblemen fehlgeschlagen ist

best_practices.maintenance_4: 在刪除子主機之前備份重要資料

kvm.title: KVM/QEMU Virtual Machine Management
kvm.overview_desc: KVM (Kernel-basierte Virtuelle Maschine) ist eine Virtualisierungstechnologie, die in den Linux-Kernel integriert ist. In Kombination mit QEMU für Hardware-Emulation und libvirt für die Verwaltung bietet sie unternehmenstaugliche Funktionen für virtuelle Maschinen. SysManage integriert sich mit KVM/libvirt, um eine nahtlose VM-Erstellung und Lebenszyklusverwaltung über die Weboberfläche zu ermöglichen.
kvm.req_cpu: CPU mit Hardware-Virtualisierungsunterstützung (Intel VT-x oder AMD-V)
kvm.req_user: Der sysmanage-agent-Benutzer muss in der libvirt-Gruppe sein
kvm.detection_desc: SysManage erkennt automatisch die KVM-Fähigkeit durch Überprüfung von:
kvm.detection_role: Bei Erkennung wird dem Host die Rolle KVM Host zugewiesen und KVM erscheint als verfügbarer Virtualisierungstyp.
kvm.setup_desc: Um einen Host für die KVM-Virtual-Machine-Verwaltung vorzubereiten:
kvm.setup_step2: KVM-Pakete installieren: sudo apt install qemu-kvm libvirt-daemon-system (Debian/Ubuntu) oder sudo dnf install qemu-kvm libvirt (Fedora/RHEL)
kvm.setup_step3: libvirtd aktivieren und starten: sudo systemctl enable --now libvirtd
kvm.setup_step4: Agent-Benutzer zur libvirt-Gruppe hinzufügen: sudo usermod -aG libvirt sysmanage-agent
kvm.setup_step5: Standardnetzwerk konfigurieren: sudo virsh net-autostart default && sudo virsh net-start default
kvm.setup_step6: sysmanage-agent-Dienst neu starten, um Gruppenmitgliedschaft zu übernehmen
kvm.setup_auto: Alternativ klicken Sie auf "KVM aktivieren" in der SysManage-Weboberfläche, um diese Einrichtungsschritte zu automatisieren.
kvm.creation_desc: Bei der Erstellung einer KVM-Virtual-Machine über SysManage:
kvm.creation_step1: SysManage lädt das Cloud-Image von der offiziellen Quelle der Distribution herunter
kvm.creation_step2: Ein neues Disk-Image wird erstellt und das Cloud-Image als Backing Store angewendet
kvm.creation_step3: Cloud-init-Konfiguration wird mit Hostname, Benutzerkonto und Agent-Einstellungen generiert
kvm.creation_step4: Die VM wird in libvirt mit den angegebenen Ressourcen (CPU, Speicher, Disk) definiert
kvm.creation_step5: VM startet und cloud-init konfiguriert das System, erstellt den Benutzer und installiert den Agent
kvm.creation_step6: Der sysmanage-agent-Dienst startet und verbindet sich mit Ihrem SysManage-Server
kvm.creation_step7: Die VM erscheint in der Host-Liste zur Genehmigung (oder automatisch genehmigt, falls ausgewählt)
kvm.form_desc: Bei der Erstellung von KVM-VMs sind zusätzliche Konfigurationsoptionen verfügbar:
kvm.field_vm_name: VM-Name: Der libvirt-Domainname (muss auf dem Host eindeutig sein)
kvm.field_cpus: vCPUs: Anzahl der virtuellen CPUs - Standard ist 2
kvm.networking_desc: KVM-VMs verbinden sich mit dem libvirt-Standardnetzwerk, das bietet:
kvm.net_dhcp: DHCP: VMs erhalten automatisch IP-Adressen von der virbr0-Brücke (typischerweise 192.168.122.x)
kvm.net_nat: NAT: Ausgehende Konnektivität wird über NAT durch den Host bereitgestellt
kvm.net_dns: DNS: VMs verwenden die DNS-Server des Hosts für die Namensauflösung
kvm.networking_bridged: Für fortgeschrittenes Netzwerk unterstützt SysManage auch den Bridged-Modus, bei dem VMs IP-Adressen direkt vom DHCP-Server Ihres Netzwerks erhalten.
kvm.lifecycle_desc: Nach der Erstellung unterstützen KVM-VMs den vollen Umfang von Lebenszyklusoperationen:
kvm.lifecycle_stop: Stopp: Die VM mit virsh shutdown sauber herunterfahren
kvm.lifecycle_restart: Neustart: Die VM mit virsh reboot neu starten
kvm.lifecycle_delete: Löschen: Die VM und ihren Speicher mit virsh undefine --remove-all-storage entfernen
kvm.distributions_desc: KVM-VMs können mit Cloud-Images von Distributionen erstellt werden, bei denen der sysmanage-agent verfügbar ist:

proplus_notice.title: 寫入操作需要Professional+
proplus_notice.description: 建立、啟動、停止、重新啟動和刪除子主機需要Professional+授權和container_engine模組。社群版仍可檢視子主機和發行版。

firewall.title: 防火牆管理 - SysManage管理
firewall.meta_description: 使用SysManage在您的基礎設施中部署、管理和監控防火牆軟體的完整指南。

header.title: 防火牆管理
header.subtitle: 全面指南，用於在您的基礎設施中部署、配置和管理防火牆軟體，具有即時監控和控制功能。

overview.title: 概述
overview.description: SysManage在所有支援的平台上提供防火牆軟體的集中管理。該平台自動化部署，實現防火牆狀態的即時監控，並提供遠端啟用、停用、重新啟動或部署防火牆軟體的工具。

features.cross_platform: 跨平台支援：在Linux、BSD、macOS和Windows系統上管理防火牆
features.auto_detection: 自動檢測：代理自動檢測並報告防火牆軟體狀態
features.remote_deployment: 遠端部署：從Web介面一鍵部署防火牆軟體
features.service_control: 服務控制：遠端啟用、停用或重新啟動防火牆服務
features.port_monitoring: 連接埠監控：即時監控開放連接埠和防火牆規則
features.realtime_status: 即時狀態：監控防火牆狀態、啟用/停用狀態和連接埠配置
features.agent_protection: 代理保護：啟用防火牆時自動打開代理通訊所需的連接埠

roles.title: 防火牆角色
roles.description: 防火牆角色提供集中式、可重複使用的防火牆配置,可以分配給多個主機。您無需在每個主機上單獨配置防火牆規則,只需定義指定哪些連接埠應該開放的角色,然後根據需要將這些角色分配給主機。
roles.benefit_consistency: 一致性: 確保具有相同角色的所有主機具有相同的防火牆配置
roles.benefit_efficiency: 效率: 一次定義,套用於多個主機
roles.benefit_flexibility: 靈活性: 隨著需求變化,輕鬆新增或移除主機的角色
roles.benefit_auditing: 稽核: 清楚了解哪些主機上開放了哪些連接埠及其原因
roles.creating_role_step1: 在主導覽選單中導覽到配置
roles.creating_role_step2: 在子選單中點擊防火牆角色
roles.creating_role_step4: 輸入角色的描述性名稱(例如「Web伺服器」、「資料庫伺服器」)
roles.creating_role_step5: 透過指定連接埠號和協定(TCP/UDP)向角色新增連接埠
roles.creating_role_step6: 選擇連接埠是否應為IPv4、IPv6或兩者都開放
roles.port_config_number: 連接埠號: 要開放的連接埠(1-65535,或0表示任意連接埠)
roles.port_config_tcp: TCP: 啟用以允許此連接埠上的TCP流量
roles.port_config_udp: UDP: 啟用以允許此連接埠上的UDP流量
roles.common_ports_description: 新增連接埠時,您可以從常用連接埠下拉選單中選擇以快速配置:
roles.assigning_roles_description: 建立防火牆角色後,您可以從主機詳細資料頁面將其分配給主機:
roles.assigning_step1: 導覽到目標主機的主機詳細資料頁面
roles.assigning_step2: 捲動到防火牆角色區段
roles.assigning_step4: 從下拉選單中選擇一個或多個要分配的角色
roles.assigning_note: 注意: 分配角色時,SysManage會自動將新的防火牆配置傳送給代理程式,代理程式會即時更新主機的防火牆規則。
roles.removing_roles_description: 要從主機移除防火牆角色:
roles.removing_step1: 導覽到主機詳細資料頁面
roles.removing_step2: 在防火牆角色區段找到要移除的角色
roles.removing_step3: 點擊角色旁邊的移除按鈕
roles.removing_note: 注意: 移除角色時,該角色開放的連接埠會自動關閉,除非另一個已分配的角色也需要這些連接埠。
roles.example_description: 以下是建立典型Web伺服器防火牆角色的範例:
roles.example_port_ssh: 連接埠22 (TCP) - SSH存取(通常預設包含)
roles.example_assign: 然後可以將此角色分配給所有Web伺服器,確保整個Web基礎架構的防火牆配置一致。
roles.platform_support_description: 防火牆角色適用於SysManage支援的所有平台:

architecture.agent_collector: Firewall Collector (src/sysmanage_agent/operations/firewall_collector.py): Detects and parses firewall status
architecture.flow_step1: User clicks firewall button in web interface
architecture.flow_step10: Frontend receives real-time update via WebSocket
architecture.flow_step2: Frontend sends REST API request to server
architecture.flow_step4: Server enqueues firewall command message for agent
architecture.flow_step5: Agent retrieves command from outbound message queue
architecture.flow_step8: Agent sends status update to server via inbound queue
architecture.server_api: Firewall Status API (backend/api/firewall_status.py): REST endpoints for firewall operations
architecture.server_models: Database Models (backend/persistence/models/core.py): FirewallStatus table for storing firewall state
architecture.server_queue: Message Queue: Queues firewall commands for delivery to agents

best_practices.configuration_practice1: Regularly review and audit firewall rules
best_practices.configuration_practice2: Use restart operation after manual configuration changes
best_practices.configuration_practice3: Document all manual firewall rule modifications
best_practices.configuration_practice4: Implement firewall configuration as code where possible
best_practices.deployment_practice1: Test firewall deployment on non-production hosts first
best_practices.deployment_practice2: Ensure you have alternate access (console, IPMI) before enabling firewalls on remote hosts
best_practices.deployment_practice3: Document custom port requirements before deployment
best_practices.deployment_practice4: Use gradual rollout for firewall deployment across large infrastructures
best_practices.monitoring_practice1: Set up alerts for hosts with disabled firewalls
best_practices.monitoring_practice2: Regularly review open ports across your infrastructure
best_practices.monitoring_practice3: Verify firewall status as part of security audits
best_practices.monitoring_practice4: Monitor for unexpected firewall status changes
best_practices.security_practice1: Grant firewall management roles only to trusted administrators
best_practices.security_practice2: Monitor firewall disable operations in security logs
best_practices.security_practice3: Implement alerts for firewall status changes
best_practices.security_practice4: Regularly verify firewall status matches security policy
best_practices.security_practice5: Use principle of least privilege when opening ports
best_practices.title: Best Practices

monitoring.automatic_updates_description: The agent automatically collects firewall status and sends updates to the server:
monitoring.description: The Firewall Status card on each host detail page provides real-time information about the firewall configuration.

info.firewall_name: Firewall Name: The detected firewall software (e.g., ufw, firewalld, IPFW, PF, NPF, Windows Defender Firewall)
info.ipv4_ports: IPv4 Ports: Ports configured for IPv4 traffic
info.ipv6_ports: IPv6 Ports: Ports configured for IPv6 traffic
info.last_updated: Last Updated: Timestamp of the last status update from the agent
info.tcp_ports: TCP Open Ports: List of TCP ports with active allow rules
info.udp_ports: UDP Open Ports: List of UDP ports with active allow rules

monitoring.title: Firewall Status Monitoring

updates.after_operations: Immediate update after deploy, enable, disable, or restart operations
updates.periodic: Periodic collection as part of regular system metrics gathering
updates.realtime_display: Real-time display updates via WebSocket communication

deploy.automatic_ports_description: When deploying or enabling a firewall, SysManage automatically opens the following ports:
deploy.description: The Deploy Firewall operation installs and configures firewall software on hosts that don't have it installed or enabled.
deploy.port_agent: Agent Communication Port: Dynamically determined from agent configuration
deploy.port_server: Server Ports (if applicable): Opened if SysManage server is detected on the host
deploy.step1: Navigate to the host detail page for the target system
deploy.step4: SysManage will automatically detect the appropriate firewall for the OS
deploy.step5: The agent installs the firewall package and configures initial rules
deploy.step6: Agent communication ports are automatically opened to prevent lockout
deploy.title: Deploy Firewall

disable.description: The Disable Firewall operation stops the firewall service, allowing all traffic through the host.
disable.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
disable.step2: Click the Disable Firewall button in the Firewall Status card
disable.step4: Firewall status will update to "Disabled" in real-time
disable.title: Disable Firewall
disable.warning_description: Disabling the firewall removes network protection and exposes all services to the network. Only disable firewalls in controlled environments or when troubleshooting network connectivity issues.

enable.description: The Enable Firewall operation starts the firewall service on a host where firewall software is installed but disabled.
enable.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
enable.step2: Click the Enable Firewall button in the Firewall Status card
enable.step3: The firewall service will start and required ports will be opened
enable.step4: Firewall status will update to "Enabled" in real-time
enable.title: Enable Firewall

restart.description: The Restart Firewall operation stops and starts the firewall service, reloading configuration and rules.
restart.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
restart.step2: Click the Restart Firewall button in the Firewall Status card
restart.step3: The firewall service will restart and reload all rules
restart.step4: Use this after manually modifying firewall configuration files
restart.title: Restart Firewall

security.assignment_step4: Select the appropriate firewall management roles
security.description: Firewall management operations are protected by role-based access control (RBAC). Users must have specific security roles to perform firewall operations.
security.role_assignment_description: Administrators can assign firewall roles to users through the user management interface:
security.role_deploy: DEPLOY_FIREWALL: Required to deploy firewall software to hosts
security.role_view: VIEW_FIREWALL_STATUS: Required to view firewall status (automatically granted with any firewall role)
security.title: Security and Access Control

bsd.description: BSD platforms support multiple firewall frameworks:
bsd.ipfw: IPFW: FreeBSD's stateful firewall with flexible rule syntax
bsd.npf: NPF: NetBSD's modern, efficient packet filter designed for scalability
bsd.pf: PF: OpenBSD's sophisticated packet filter available on all BSD variants
bsd.title: BSD Systems

linux.description: SysManage supports the following firewall solutions on Linux:
linux.firewalld: firewalld - Dynamic firewall management tool for RHEL, CentOS, Fedora, and openSUSE

linux.nftables: nftables - Modern packet filtering framework replacing iptables
linux.title: Linux Systems
linux.ufw: UFW (Uncomplicated Firewall) - User-friendly firewall frontend for iptables on Ubuntu/Debian systems

macos.pf: PF (Packet Filter): OpenBSD's packet filter ported to macOS
macos.title: macOS

windows.defender: Windows Defender Firewall: Integrated host-based firewall with advanced security features
windows.profiles: Support for Domain, Private, and Public network profiles
windows.rules: Inbound and outbound rule management via PowerShell and netsh
windows.title: Windows

troubleshooting.deploy_fails_solution1: Verify the agent is running with elevated privileges (root/Administrator)
troubleshooting.deploy_fails_solution2: Check network connectivity to package repositories
troubleshooting.deploy_fails_solution3: Review agent logs for detailed error messages
troubleshooting.deploy_fails_solution4: Ensure package manager is functioning (apt, yum, dnf, pkg, etc.)
troubleshooting.deploy_fails_symptoms: Symptoms: Deploy operation returns error or times out
troubleshooting.locked_out_solution1: This should not happen - agent automatically opens required ports
troubleshooting.locked_out_solution2: Access host via console or out-of-band management
troubleshooting.locked_out_solution3: Manually disable firewall and check agent configuration
troubleshooting.locked_out_solution4: Verify agent port configuration matches firewall rules
troubleshooting.locked_out_symptoms: Symptoms: Cannot connect to agent after enabling firewall
troubleshooting.no_firewall_detected_solution1: Click "Deploy Firewall" to install firewall software automatically
troubleshooting.no_firewall_detected_solution2: Verify the agent has privileges to detect firewall status
troubleshooting.no_firewall_detected_solution3: Check agent logs for firewall detection errors
troubleshooting.no_firewall_detected_symptoms: Symptoms: Firewall Status card shows "No firewall detected"
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution1: Verify your user account has the required firewall security role
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution2: Contact administrator to request firewall management permissions
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution3: Check that role assignments have been saved and user session refreshed
troubleshooting.permission_denied_symptoms: Symptoms: Button is disabled or operation returns "Permission denied"
troubleshooting.status_not_updating_solution1: Click "Request Host Data" to force immediate status collection
troubleshooting.status_not_updating_solution3: Review agent logs for errors during status collection
troubleshooting.status_not_updating_solution4: Verify WebSocket connection is active (check browser console)
troubleshooting.status_not_updating_symptoms: Symptoms: Firewall Status card shows stale or incorrect information

host_accounts.title: 主機帳戶管理 - SysManage 管理
host_accounts.meta_description: 使用 SysManage 建立和管理遠端主機上的使用者帳戶和群組的完整指南。

header.title: 主機帳戶管理
header.subtitle: 在所有支援的平台上建立和管理遠端主機上的使用者帳戶和群組。

overview.title: 概述
overview.description: SysManage provides centralized management of user accounts and groups on remote hosts. Create users and groups from the web interface without needing direct SSH access, with full support for platform-specific options across Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows systems.

features.cross_platform: Cross-Platform Support: Create users and groups on Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows
features.platform_specific: Platform-Specific Options: Configure shell, home directory, UID/GID, and Windows-specific settings
features.web_interface: Web Interface: Create accounts directly from the host detail page
features.rbac: Role-Based Access: Granular permissions for account and group management
features.audit_logging: Audit Logging: All account operations are logged for compliance
features.privileged_mode: Privileged Mode Required: Agent must run with elevated privileges for account management

linux.title: Linux 系統
linux.description: User and group creation uses standard useradd and groupadd commands:

bsd.title: BSD 系統
bsd.description: BSD platforms use their native account management tools:

macos.title: macOS
macos.description: macOS uses Directory Services for account management:

windows.title: Windows
windows.description: Windows uses native account management commands:
windows.net_user: net user: Create and manage local user accounts
windows.net_localgroup: net localgroup: Create and manage local groups

create.title: 建立使用者帳戶
create.description: Create new user accounts on remote hosts through the web interface or API.
create.steps_title: 透過 Web 介面建立
create.step1: Navigate to the host detail page for the target system
create.step2: Locate the Users card in the host details
create.step4: Fill in the required username and optional fields
create.step6: The user list will update automatically after creation
create.opt_fullname: Full name or comment for the user
create.opt_createhome: Create home directory if it doesn't exist
create.opt_primarygroup: Primary group name for the user
create.opt_mustchange: Require password change on first login

create.title: 建立群組
create.description: Create new groups on remote hosts through the web interface or API.
create.steps_title: 透過 Web 介面建立
create.step1: Navigate to the host detail page for the target system
create.step2: Locate the Groups card in the host details
create.step4: Fill in the required group name and optional fields
create.step6: The group list will update automatically after creation
create.opt_description: Description or comment for the group

privileged_mode.title: 需要特權模式
privileged_mode.description: The SysManage agent must be running in privileged mode (as root or Administrator) to create user accounts and groups. If the agent is not running in privileged mode, the Add User and Add Group buttons will be disabled.
privileged_mode.check_description: The host detail page shows whether the agent is running in privileged mode. Look for the "Agent Privileged" indicator in the host information section.
privileged_mode.warning_description: Running the agent in privileged mode grants it elevated system access. Only enable privileged mode on hosts where you need account management or other privileged operations.

active_host.title: 活動主機連接
active_host.description: The target host must be active and connected to the SysManage server. Account creation requests are queued and delivered to the agent when it's online.

security.title: 安全和存取控制
security.description: Host account management operations are protected by role-based access control (RBAC). Users must have specific security roles to create accounts and groups.
security.role_add_account: ADD_HOST_ACCOUNT: Required to create user accounts on hosts
security.role_add_group: ADD_HOST_GROUP: Required to create groups on hosts
security.role_edit_account: EDIT_HOST_ACCOUNT: Required to modify existing user accounts
security.role_assignment_description: Administrators can assign host account management roles to users through the user management interface:
security.assignment_step4: Select the appropriate host account management roles

troubleshooting.title: 故障排除
troubleshooting.button_disabled_symptoms: Symptoms: The Add User or Add Group button is grayed out
troubleshooting.button_disabled_solution1: Verify the agent is running in privileged mode
troubleshooting.button_disabled_solution2: Check that you have the required ADD_HOST_ACCOUNT or ADD_HOST_GROUP role
troubleshooting.button_disabled_solution3: Ensure the host is active and connected
troubleshooting.creation_fails_solution1: Check that the username/group name doesn't already exist
troubleshooting.creation_fails_solution2: Verify the UID/GID isn't already in use
troubleshooting.creation_fails_solution3: Review agent logs for detailed error messages
troubleshooting.creation_fails_solution4: Ensure the specified shell exists on the target system
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution1: Verify your user account has the required role (ADD_HOST_ACCOUNT or ADD_HOST_GROUP)
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution2: Contact administrator to request host account management permissions
troubleshooting.permission_denied_solution3: Refresh your session after role changes
troubleshooting.list_not_updating_symptoms: Symptoms: Created user/group doesn't appear in the list
troubleshooting.list_not_updating_solution1: Wait a few moments for the agent to report updated data
troubleshooting.list_not_updating_solution2: Click "Request Host Data" to force an immediate update
troubleshooting.list_not_updating_solution3: Check WebSocket connection status in browser console

best_practices.title: 最佳實踐
best_practices.naming_practice1: Use consistent username formats across your infrastructure
best_practices.naming_practice2: Follow your organization's naming standards for service accounts
best_practices.naming_practice3: Use descriptive group names that indicate purpose
best_practices.security_practice1: Grant host account management roles only to trusted administrators
best_practices.security_practice2: Review audit logs for account creation activities
best_practices.security_practice3: Use separate service accounts for applications rather than shared accounts
best_practices.security_practice4: Implement password policies for Windows accounts
best_practices.operational_practice1: Create groups before creating users that need to belong to them
best_practices.operational_practice2: Document custom UID/GID assignments to avoid conflicts
best_practices.operational_practice3: Test account creation on non-production hosts first

deploy_early.description: Deploy antivirus software immediately after host approval for maximum protection.
deploy_early.title: Deploy Early

monitor_regularly.description: Regularly review antivirus status across your infrastructure to ensure all systems are protected.
monitor_regularly.title: Monitor Regularly

privileged_agents.description: Ensure agents run with elevated privileges (root/administrator) to enable full antivirus management capabilities.
privileged_agents.title: Run Agents with Privileges

role_based_access.description: Restrict antivirus management permissions to trusted administrators only, especially REMOVE_ANTIVIRUS and DISABLE_ANTIVIRUS roles.
role_based_access.title: Use Role-Based Access Control

standards.description: Use the default configuration feature to ensure consistent antivirus deployment across all hosts of the same operating system.
standards.title: Maintain Consistent Standards

test_deployments.description: Test antivirus deployment on non-production hosts before rolling out to production systems.
test_deployments.title: Test Deployments

defaults.description: SysManage allows administrators to define which antivirus software should be deployed for each operating system. These defaults are used when deploying antivirus to hosts.
defaults.permissions_description: Managing antivirus defaults requires the MANAGE_ANTIVIRUS_DEFAULTS security role. Contact your administrator if you need this permission.
defaults.step1: Navigate to Settings in the main menu
defaults.step3: For each operating system, select the desired antivirus package from the dropdown
defaults.step4: Select "None" to disable automatic antivirus deployment for that OS
defaults.title: Setting Default Antivirus Software

deployment.overview_description: Antivirus deployment in SysManage is a fully automated process that installs and configures the antivirus software appropriate for the target host's operating system.

process.description: The deployment process varies slightly by platform but generally follows these steps:

linux_bsd.step2: ClamAV and related packages are downloaded and installed
linux_bsd.step3: freshclam service is enabled and started (updates virus definitions)
linux_bsd.step4: clamd service is enabled and started (real-time scanning daemon)
linux_bsd.step5: Initial virus definition update is performed
linux_bsd.step6: Agent reports deployment status back to server

macos.step2: freshclam is configured and virus definitions are updated
macos.step3: ClamAV service is started via brew services

process.title: What Happens During Deployment

windows.step1: ClamAV for Windows installer is downloaded
windows.step3: ClamAV Windows service is configured and started

requirements.active_host: Host must be active and connected to the server
requirements.default_configured: A default antivirus package must be configured for the host's operating system
requirements.network: Host must have internet access to download antivirus packages

security_roles.enable: Allows user to enable antivirus services on hosts

disable.description: To temporarily disable antivirus without removing it:
disable.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
disable.step2: In the Antivirus card, click Disable Antivirus
disable.step3: Confirm the action in the dialog
disable.step4: The agent will stop the antivirus service
disable.title: Disabling Antivirus
disable.warning: ⚠️ Security Warning: Disabling antivirus leaves the system vulnerable to malware. Only disable antivirus when necessary for troubleshooting.

enable.description: If antivirus is installed but disabled, you can enable it remotely:
enable.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
enable.step2: In the Antivirus card, click Enable Antivirus
enable.step3: Confirm the action in the dialog
enable.step4: The agent will start the antivirus service and report the new status
enable.title: Enabling Antivirus

remove.description: To completely remove antivirus software from a host:
remove.step1: Navigate to the host detail page
remove.step2: In the Antivirus card, click Remove Antivirus
remove.step5: The agent will stop services, uninstall packages, and clean up configuration files
remove.title: Removing Antivirus
remove.warning1: Antivirus removal is irreversible from the web interface
remove.warning2: System will be unprotected after removal
remove.warning3: Virus definition databases and logs will be deleted
remove.warning4: Use the "Deploy Antivirus" button to reinstall if needed

defense_in_depth.description: SysManage 中的每個受保護操作都使用兩層安全驗證方法：

layer1.description: UI 元素（按鈕、選單、操作）根據使用者權限被隱藏或停用。這可以防止使用者嘗試未經授權的操作，並提供更好的使用者體驗。
layer1.title: 🖥️ 前端層

layer2.description: API 端點在執行任何操作之前驗證使用者權限。即使繞過前端，後端也會透過 HTTP 403 錯誤強制執行安全性，防止未經授權的存取。
layer2.title: 🔒 後端層

defense_in_depth.title: 縱深防禦架構

why.description: 前端層不能被信任用於安全執行，因為它在使用者的瀏覽器中執行並且可以被操縱。後端層提供實際的安全保證。它們一起提供安全性（後端）和可用性（前端）。
why.title: 為什麼需要兩層？

architecture.description: SysManage 和 OpenBAO 之間的整合創建了堡壘般的安全架構，保護您最敏感的數據。
architecture.principle1: 零信任：每個存取請求都經過身份驗證和授權
architecture.principle2: 無處不在的加密：數據在靜態、傳輸和記憶體中加密
architecture.principle3: 最小暴露：機密僅在需要時解密
architecture.principle4: 全面審計：每個操作都被記錄和可追踪
architecture.principle5: 最小權限原則：僅在需要時授予存取權限
architecture.step1_description: 機密在 OpenBAO 保險庫中加密儲存，具有元數據跟踪

architecture.step3_description: 機密按需檢索，具有完整的審計日誌
architecture.step4_description: 機密通過加密的 WebSocket 通道傳輸到代理
architecture.title: 🏗️ 安全架構

alerting.meta_description: Configurable alerting with email, webhook, Slack, and Microsoft Teams notifications for proactive infrastructure monitoring.

header.title: Alerting Engine Module
header.description: Configurable alerting with multiple notification channels to keep you informed about critical infrastructure events in real-time.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: The Alerting Engine provides proactive notification when your infrastructure needs attention. Define custom alert rules based on host conditions, and receive notifications through your preferred channels - email, webhooks, Slack, or Microsoft Teams.

conditions.title: Alert Conditions
conditions.description: Create alert rules based on various infrastructure conditions:

host_down.title: Host Down
host_down.description: Alert when a host stops reporting for a configurable time threshold (default: 10 minutes).

reboot.title: Reboot Required
reboot.description: Alert when a host requires a reboot to apply system updates or configuration changes.

updates.title: Updates Available
updates.description: Alert when a host has pending package updates, with configurable minimum count.

disk.title: Disk Usage
disk.description: Alert when disk usage exceeds a threshold percentage on specified mount points.

cve.title: CVE Severity
cve.description: Alert when hosts have vulnerabilities at or above a specified severity level.

custom.title: Custom Metrics
custom.description: Alert based on custom metric thresholds with configurable operators and values.

channels.title: Notification Channels
channels.description: Configure multiple notification channels to receive alerts:

webhook.title: Webhook
webhook.json: JSON payload with full alert details

severity.title: Alert Severity Levels
severity.description: Alerts are classified by severity to help prioritize response:

critical.label: Critical
critical.description: Immediate action required - critical system failures or security risks

high.label: High
high.description: Urgent attention needed - significant issues affecting operations

medium.label: Medium
medium.description: Should be addressed soon - potential problems identified

low.label: Low
low.description: Monitor - minor issues that can be addressed during maintenance

info.label: Info
info.description: Informational - status changes and non-critical notifications

cooldown.title: Alert Cooldown
cooldown.description: Configure cooldown periods to prevent alert fatigue. Once an alert fires for a host+rule combination, subsequent alerts are suppressed for the cooldown duration (default: 60 minutes).

filters.title: Host Filters
filters.description: Apply alert rules to specific hosts using tag-based filters. For example, create different alerting policies for production vs. development environments.

multi_channel.title: Multi-Channel Routing
multi_channel.description: Link multiple notification channels to a single rule. Critical alerts can go to both email and Slack, while informational alerts might only go to a webhook.

acknowledge.title: Alert Acknowledgment
acknowledge.description: Acknowledge alerts to indicate they're being addressed. Acknowledged alerts are tracked with username and timestamp for audit purposes.

resolution.title: Alert Resolution
resolution.description: Mark alerts as resolved when the underlying issue is fixed. Resolution status helps track mean time to resolution (MTTR) metrics.

steps.navigate: Navigate to Alerts > Alert Rules in the main navigation
steps.create: Click "Create Rule" to open the rule editor
steps.name: Enter a descriptive name for the rule
steps.condition: Select the condition type and configure its parameters
steps.channels: Select one or more notification channels
steps.save: Save the rule - it will be evaluated on the next cycle

configuring_channels.title: Configuring Notification Channels
configuring_channels.description: Configure notification channels in Settings > Alerting:

api.title: API Access
api.description: The Alerting Engine is fully accessible via the REST API:

evaluation.title: Alert Evaluation
evaluation.description: The alerting engine runs in the background and evaluates all enabled rules:
evaluation.async: Asynchronous evaluation prevents blocking the main application
evaluation.cooldown: Cooldown periods prevent duplicate alerts for the same issue
evaluation.notifications: Notifications are dispatched immediately when alerts fire

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.license: Professional or Enterprise license with alerting_engine module
requirements.network: Network connectivity to license server for module download
requirements.webhooks: Outbound network access for webhook/Slack/Teams notifications

custom.title: Custom Policies

checks.description: The compliance engine evaluates numerous configuration aspects:

status.description: Each compliance check returns one of the following statuses:

pass.label: Pass
pass.description: System configuration meets the compliance requirement

fail.label: Fail
fail.description: Configuration does not meet the requirement - remediation needed

warning.label: Warning
warning.description: Partially compliant or manual verification required

skip.label: Skipped
skip.description: Check not applicable to this system or platform

delete.description: 永久移除容器及其關聯的儲存空間，從SysManage中取消註冊並釋放資源。

distributions.title: 發行版管理
distributions.description: 對於WSL主機，容器引擎提供發行版管理功能，控制哪些Linux發行版可用於建立新執行個體：
distributions.create: 建立發行版：註冊具有名稱、版本和類型的新WSL發行版
distributions.update: 更新發行版：修改發行版名稱、版本或組態
distributions.delete: 刪除發行版：移除不再需要的發行版
distributions.duplicate: 重複偵測：防止建立具有相同名稱、版本和類型的發行版

monitoring.title: 容器監控
monitoring.description: 受管容器的即時監控和統計：

statistics.title: 容器統計
statistics.running: 按類型執行中的容器數量
statistics.stopped: 按類型已停止的容器數量
statistics.total: 所有容器類型的總執行個體數
statistics.breakdown: 每個主機的容器分佈細分

resources.title: 資源使用
resources.memory: 每個容器的記憶體配置和消耗
resources.disk: 磁碟空間使用和儲存限制

status.title: 狀態追蹤
status.realtime: 即時狀態監控（執行中、已停止、錯誤）
status.uptime: 自上次啟動以來的正常運行時間追蹤
status.events: 生命週期操作的事件歷史記錄

api.title: API存取
api.description: 容器引擎可透過REST API完全存取：

steps.navigate: 在SysManage中導覽到主機詳細資訊頁面
steps.create: 點選「建立」以設定新執行個體
steps.name: 執行個體名稱和描述
steps.image: 作業系統映像或發行版
steps.user: SSH存取的使用者認證資料
steps.provision: 點選「設定」以建立執行個體
steps.monitor: 監控建立進度和代理安裝
steps.manage: 根據需要使用生命週期操作（啟動/停止/重新啟動/刪除）

requirements.title: 需求
requirements.permissions: 建立和管理容器的足夠權限
requirements.network: 用於授權驗證和代理通訊的網路連線
requirements.resources: 容器的充足主機資源（CPU、記憶體、磁碟）
requirements.images: 存取所選平台的OS映像或發行版

wsl.title: WSL（Windows）
wsl.description: 需要Windows 10版本2004+或Windows 11，並啟用WSL 2。可以從Microsoft Store安裝發行版或作為自訂映像匯入。發行版管理功能允許註冊可用於建立新執行個體的發行版。

lxd.title: LXD/LXC（Linux）
lxd.description: 需要透過snap或原生套件安裝LXD。支援系統容器（完整OS）和應用程式容器。可從公共映像伺服器取得映像。

future.title: 未來：硬體虛擬化
future.description: 對完整硬體虛擬化技術（KVM/QEMU、Hyper-V、bhyve、VMM）的支援計劃在未來的企業版模組中提供。這將提供具有硬體輔助隔離的完整虛擬機器管理。

reboot_orchestration.page_title: 重新啟動編排 - SysManage Professional+
reboot_orchestration.meta_description: WSL和LXD容器的安全父主機重新啟動，自動停止和重新啟動子主機。

header.title: 重新啟動編排模組
header.description: 安全的父主機重新啟動，自動編排子主機。在重新啟動前乾淨地停止執行中的容器，然後在主機恢復上線後自動重新啟動它們。

overview.title: 概觀
overview.description: 重新啟動編排模組為擁有執行中子主機（WSL或LXD容器）的父主機提供安全、自動化的重新啟動工作流程。編排器遵循受控序列，確保所有子主機在重新啟動前被乾淨地停止，並在之後自動重新啟動，而不是突然重新啟動導致容器中的資料遺失風險。

reboot.title: 重新啟動父主機
reboot.desc: 子主機停止後執行重新啟動

opensource.title: 開源版 vs Professional+
opensource.description: 開源社群版包含一個預檢查端點，在重新啟動前警告執行中的子主機。Professional+ 重新啟動編排模組新增完整的自動化編排：
opensource.pre_check: 社群版：預檢查警告在重新啟動前顯示執行中的子主機
opensource.orchestrated: Professional+：自動化停止、重新啟動和恢復編排
opensource.tracking: Professional+：帶時間戳的即時編排狀態追蹤
opensource.recovery: Professional+：父主機重新啟動後自動恢復子主機

state_machine.title: 編排狀態機
state_machine.description: 每次編排重新啟動遵循一個明確定義的狀態機。編排經過以下狀態：

shutting_down.label: shutting_down
shutting_down.desc: 向所有執行中的子主機傳送停止命令；等待確認

rebooting.label: rebooting
rebooting.desc: 所有子主機已停止；向父主機傳送重新啟動命令

pending_restart.label: pending_restart
pending_restart.desc: 父主機正在重新啟動；等待代理重新連線

restarting.label: restarting
restarting.desc: 代理已重新連線；向之前執行的子主機傳送啟動命令

completed.label: completed
completed.desc: 所有子主機成功重新啟動

failed.label: failed
failed.desc: 一個或多個子主機重新啟動失敗；錯誤詳情可用

api.title: API 參考
api.description: 重新啟動編排模組提供三個 API 端點：

pre_check.title: 重新啟動預檢查（開源）
pre_check.description: 傳回執行中子主機的資訊，以便使用者在重新啟動前做出明智決定。在開源社群版中可用。

orchestrated.title: 編排重新啟動（Pro+）
orchestrated.description: 啟動編排重新啟動序列。停止所有執行中的子主機，重新啟動父主機，並在代理重新連線後自動重新啟動子主機。需要帶有 container_engine 模組的 Professional+ 授權。
orchestrated.error_402: 需要 Professional+ 授權。升級以存取編排重新啟動。
orchestrated.error_400: 主機未啟用，或未找到執行中的子主機。

status.title: 編排狀態
status.description: 傳回重新啟動編排的目前狀態，包括每個階段的時間戳和每個子主機的重新啟動狀態。

frontend.title: 前端行為
frontend.description: 重新啟動具有執行中子主機的父主機時，前端提供增強的體驗：
frontend.pre_check_dialog: 重新啟動對話方塊顯示執行中子主機的預檢查摘要
frontend.orchestrated_option: 使用 Pro+ 時，「編排重新啟動」按鈕取代具有子主機的主機的標準重新啟動
frontend.progress_polling: 進度指示器輪詢編排狀態端點以顯示即時狀態轉換
frontend.completion_notification: 編排完成或子主機重新啟動失敗時顯示通知

timeouts.title: 逾時和錯誤處理
timeouts.description: 編排服務包含內建保護措施，以處理任何階段的故障：
timeouts.shutdown_timeout: 關閉逾時：如果子主機未在設定的逾時時間內停止（預設120秒），重新啟動仍會繼續
timeouts.agent_reconnect: 代理重新連線：當父主機的代理在重新啟動後傳送第一個心跳時，編排從「重新啟動中」轉換為「恢復中」
timeouts.partial_failure: 部分失敗：如果某些子主機重新啟動失敗，編排將以指示哪些子主機失敗的錯誤訊息完成
timeouts.audit_logging: 稽核日誌：所有編排事件記錄在稽核日誌中，用於合規和故障排除

requirements.title: 需求
requirements.license: 啟用了 container_engine 模組的 Professional 或 Enterprise 授權
requirements.children: 父主機必須至少有一個執行中的子主機（WSL 或 LXD）
requirements.permissions: 使用者必須擁有 REBOOT_HOST 安全角色
requirements.agent: 父主機上執行著具有作用中連線的 SysManage 代理

av_management_engine.page_title: AV 管理引擎 - SysManage Professional+
av_management_engine.meta_description: 整個機隊的集中式防毒部署、政策管理、掃描排程和商業 AV 偵測。

header.title: AV 管理引擎
header.description: 適用於 ClamAV (Linux/BSD/macOS) 和 ClamWin (Windows) 的集中式、基於政策的防毒部署。在開源基礎之上添加可重用的 AV 政策、排程掃描、定義更新節奏控制和全機隊商業 AV 偵測報告。

overview.title: 概述
overview.description: AV 管理引擎在伺服器端產生 ClamAV / ClamWin 設定，並將其作為完全準備好的部署計畫傳送給代理。代理透過通用 apply_deployment_plan 處理程式執行計畫 — 代理上沒有 AV 業務邏輯。引擎在其上添加 AvPolicy 抽象，以便操作員可以定義單個命名政策（節奏 + 排程 + 產品）並將其套用於任意數量的主機。

opensource.title: 開源 vs Professional+
opensource.deploy: Community Edition：透過 backend/services/av_plan_builder.py 進行每主機安裝 / 啟用 / 停用 / 移除
opensource.policies: Professional+：可重用的命名政策，具有節奏 + 掃描排程，在一次呼叫中套用於多個主機
opensource.commercial: Professional+：全機隊商業 AV 偵測報告（CrowdStrike、SentinelOne、Defender 等）
opensource.scheduling: Professional+：cron 風格的每日 / 每週 / 每月排程掃描（Linux/FreeBSD 透過 /etc/cron.d；Windows 透過 schtasks）

deploy_plan.title: 部署計畫形狀
deploy_plan.description: 每個操作都會產生一個聲明性部署計畫，代理逐步執行該計畫（安裝套件 → 寫入設定 → 執行命令 → 啟動服務）。該計畫與開源規劃器線相容，因此同一個代理處理程式執行兩者：

policies.title: AV 政策
policies.description: AvPolicy 將 AV 產品、定義更新節奏和掃描排程捆綁到一個命名的、可重用的單元中。將其套用於任意多的主機；引擎解析每個主機的建構選項，並為每個主機排隊一個 APPLY_DEPLOYMENT_PLAN 訊息。

commercial.title: 商業 AV 機隊報告
commercial.description: 代理的開源 commercial_antivirus_collection.py 已經偵測 CrowdStrike、SentinelOne、Defender、McAfee、Symantec 等，並將每主機狀態寫入 commercial_antivirus_status 表。Professional+ 添加了一個機隊聚合端點，該端點總結了哪些產品安裝在多少主機上，並顯示停用了即時保護的主機。

feature_codes.title: 功能代碼
feature_codes.description: 此引擎中的端點由這些功能代碼控制（當模組未載入時，開源伺服器返回 402）：

architecture.title: 架構
architecture.description: 引擎是一個 Cython 編譯的二進制檔案 (av_management_engine.so)，由開源伺服器的 module_loader 在啟動時載入。它匯出與其他 Pro+ 模組相同的 get_module_info() + get_av_management_router() 契約，因此開源伺服器的 mount_av_management_routes() 包裝器可以無條件地將其與 402 樁一起掛載。

firewall_orchestration_engine.page_title: 防火牆編排引擎 - SysManage Professional+
firewall_orchestration_engine.meta_description: 多平台防火牆設定產生、角色指派、全機隊政策部署、規則衝突偵測和合規性報告。

header.title: 防火牆編排引擎
header.description: 伺服器端、多平台防火牆規則產生。從統一的 PortRule 模式建構 UFW、firewalld、pf、ipfw、npf、Windows Firewall 和 macOS socketfilterfw 計畫。在開源基礎之上添加角色指派、全機隊政策部署、規則衝突偵測和合規性報告。

overview.title: 概述
overview.description: 防火牆編排引擎在伺服器端產生每個平台的防火牆設定，並將它們作為部署計畫傳送給代理。代理透過通用 apply_deployment_plan 處理程式執行計畫 — 代理上沒有防火牆業務邏輯（只有用於狀態回報的唯讀 firewall_collector.py 保留）。所有七個支援的版本共用一個具有來源限制、入/出方向和動作（允許/拒絕）的單一 PortRule 模式。

opensource.title: 開源 vs Professional+
opensource.basics: Community Edition：透過 backend/services/firewall_plan_builder.py 啟用 / 停用 / 重啟 / 部署，以及每主機添加 / 移除角色連接埠
opensource.rich_rules: Professional+：來源限制規則 (CIDR)、入/出方向、命名規則描述、引擎內驗證
opensource.fleet: Professional+：帶平台 / 核准狀態過濾器的全機隊部署
opensource.conflict: Professional+：部署前規則衝突偵測（允許/拒絕不匹配、來源遮蔽、多個不同來源）
opensource.compliance: Professional+：將指派的角色與實際防火牆狀態進行比較的機隊合規性報告

flavors.title: 支援的防火牆版本
flavors.description: 主機的版本從 platform + platform_release 偵測：

fleet.title: 機隊政策部署
fleet.description: 在一次呼叫中將角色集套用於許多主機。提供明確的 host_ids 或 host_filter（platform / approval_status，AND 組合）。沒有建構器的平台上的主機會被跳過並附帶原因。

conflicts.title: 規則衝突偵測
conflicts.description: 在任何計畫被排隊之前，detect_rule_conflicts() 遍歷扁平化的規則清單並顯示不一致的意圖：
conflicts.identical: 列出兩次的相同規則不會被回報 — 它們只是被去重。

compliance.title: 合規性報告
compliance.description: 將每個主機的角色衍生預期連接埠集與 FirewallStatus.tcp_open_ports 回報為實際開啟的連接埠集進行比較。僅當主機有狀態列且 actual_ports ⊇ expected_ports 時，主機才合規。

lockout.title: 鎖定保護
lockout.description: 每次 build_*_rules 呼叫始終首先重新允許管理連接埠 — SSH (22)、DNS (53)、DHCP (67)，加上傳遞給 host_info["agent_ports"] 的任何代理通訊連接埠，加上 Windows 上的 RDP (3389)。移除建構器靜默跳過保留的連接埠，並在 skipped_preserved_ports 中顯示它們，以便操作員可以進行稽核。這是不可繞過的；引擎拒絕發出會鎖定代理的計畫。

architecture.title: 架構
architecture.description: 引擎是一個 Cython 編譯的二進制檔案 (firewall_orchestration_engine.so)，由開源伺服器的 module_loader 在啟動時載入。它匯出與其他 Pro+ 模組相同的 get_module_info() + get_firewall_orchestration_router() 契約。除了回報當前狀態的唯讀 firewall_collector.py 之外，代理在階段 3 發布後不保留任何防火牆業務邏輯。

header.title: 報告和PDF生成
header.description: 全面的報告系統，具有即時HTML檢視和專業PDF生成功能。

proplus_notice.title: 需要Professional+
proplus_notice.description: 報告檢視和PDF生成需要Professional+授權和reporting_engine模組。社群版使用者存取報告端點時將收到HTTP 402。所有使用者仍可使用報告截圖預覽。
